facts.content: User needs PDF parsing capability to analyze documents, specifically resumes for Java backend developer positions.
User is analyzing a resume for candidate 杨佳文 (Yang Jiawen) for a Java backend developer role.
The system attempted to parse a PDF using multiple methods (read_file, grep, generate_report) but all failed due to binary format restrictions and execution environment limitations.
The system generated a partial resume analysis report framework at /mnt/user-data/outputs/杨佳文-Java后端简历分析报告.md in Markdown format.
